name: twilize
description: Tableau Workbook (.twb/.twbx) generation MCP server with 47 tools for charts, dashboards, rules engine, and intelligent template selection

tools.name: create_workbook
tools.description: Create a new workbook from a TWB or TWBX template file

tools.name: open_workbook
tools.description: Open an existing workbook (.twb or .twbx) for in-place worksheet editing

tools.name: save_workbook
tools.description: Save the workbook as TWB (XML) or TWBX (ZIP with bundled extracts/images)

tools.name: list_fields
tools.description: List all available dimensions and measures in the current datasource

tools.name: list_worksheets
tools.description: List worksheet names in the active workbook

tools.name: list_dashboards
tools.description: List dashboards and their worksheet zones

tools.name: undo_last_change
tools.description: Undo the last mutating operation, restoring the previous workbook state

tools.name: add_calculated_field
tools.description: Add a calculated field with Tableau formula to the datasource

tools.name: remove_calculated_field
tools.description: Remove a previously added calculated field

tools.name: add_parameter
tools.description: Add an interactive parameter for what-if analysis

tools.name: add_worksheet
tools.description: Add a new blank worksheet to the workbook

tools.name: configure_chart
tools.description: Configure chart type and field mappings for a worksheet (Bar, Line, Area, Pie, Map, Scatter, Heatmap, TreeMap, Bubble, Text/KPI)

tools.name: configure_dual_axis
tools.description: Configure a dual-axis chart composition with two overlaid mark types

tools.name: configure_chart_recipe
tools.description: Configure a showcase recipe chart (Donut, Lollipop, Bullet, Bump, Butterfly, Calendar)

tools.name: configure_worksheet_style
tools.description: Apply worksheet-level styling: background color, axis/grid/border visibility, cell formats

tools.name: add_reference_line
tools.description: Add a reference line to a worksheet (constant, average, median, etc.)

tools.name: add_reference_band
tools.description: Add a reference band (shaded region) to a worksheet

tools.name: add_trend_line
tools.description: Add a trend line to a worksheet (linear, polynomial, log, exp, power)

tools.name: apply_color_palette
tools.description: Set a custom or built-in color palette (tableau10, tableau20, blue-red, green-gold)

tools.name: add_dashboard
tools.description: Create a dashboard combining multiple worksheets with layout control

tools.name: add_dashboard_action
tools.description: Add filter or highlight interaction actions to a dashboard

tools.name: apply_dashboard_theme
tools.description: Apply uniform styling (background, font) to all zones in a dashboard

tools.name: generate_layout_json
tools.description: Build a structured dashboard flexbox layout JSON file

tools.name: set_mysql_connection
tools.description: Configure the datasource to use a local MySQL connection

tools.name: set_tableauserver_connection
tools.description: Configure connection to an online Tableau Server

tools.name: set_hyper_connection
tools.description: Configure the datasource to use a local Hyper extract

tools.name: inspect_target_schema
tools.description: Inspect the schema of a target Excel or Hyper datasource

tools.name: list_capabilities
tools.description: Show twilize's declared capability boundary (core/advanced/recipe/unsupported)

tools.name: describe_capability
tools.description: Explain whether a specific chart or feature is core, advanced, recipe, or unsupported

tools.name: analyze_twb
tools.description: Analyze a TWB file against the capability catalog with gap triage

tools.name: diff_template_gap
tools.description: Summarize the non-core capability gap of a TWB template

tools.name: validate_workbook
tools.description: Validate a workbook against the official Tableau TWB XSD schema (2026.1)

tools.name: get_active_rules
tools.description: Return the active dashboard creation rules (YAML-driven constraints enforced at tool level)

tools.name: profile_data_source
tools.description: Profile the currently connected data source (works for CSV, Hyper, MySQL, Tableau Server, or any source)

tools.name: profile_csv
tools.description: Profile a CSV file before connecting it (standalone, no active workbook needed)

tools.name: recommend_template
tools.description: Score all gallery templates against data profile and chart mix, return ranked recommendations

tools.name: recommend_template_for_csv
tools.description: Recommend layout templates for a CSV file (standalone, no active workbook needed)

tools.name: list_gallery_templates
tools.description: List all templates in the gallery with suitability rules and zone descriptions

tools.name: inspect_csv
tools.description: Inspect a CSV file schema with column type inference and classification

tools.name: suggest_charts_for_csv
tools.description: Suggest chart types and configurations for a CSV file

tools.name: csv_to_hyper
tools.description: Convert a CSV file to a Tableau Hyper extract

tools.name: csv_to_dashboard
tools.description: Build a complete Tableau dashboard from a CSV file (end-to-end pipeline)

tools.name: profile_twb_for_migration
tools.description: Profile workbook datasources and worksheet scope before migration

tools.name: propose_field_mapping
tools.description: Fuzzy-match source fields to target fields with confidence scores

tools.name: preview_twb_migration
tools.description: Dry-run a migration: report blockers, warnings, and rewrite summary

tools.name: apply_twb_migration
tools.description: Apply a workbook migration and write a migrated TWB plus reports

tools.name: migrate_twb_guided
tools.description: Run the built-in migration workflow with automatic pause for warning confirmation

resources.description: Complete list of Tableau calculation functions with syntax and examples
Markdown index listing all available agent skill files
Agent skill guides: calculation_builder, chart_builder, dashboard_designer, formatting

claude-code.command: claude mcp add twilize -- uvx twilize
